name: Western Union
description_short: Cleveland Heights, OH Western Union location at 3628 Mayfield Rd provides check cashing and money transfer services daily from 7 AM to 11 PM.
description_long:
Western Union at 3628 Mayfield Rd in Cleveland Heights, OH is a standalone check-cashing location serving the community with extended daily hours. This Cleveland Heights outpost operates from 7 AM to 11 PM every day of the week, making it convenient for residents with busy schedules. The location on Mayfield Rd is easily accessible throughout the Cleveland Heights area.

This Cleveland Heights Western Union branch offers money transfers both domestic and international, check cashing services, and other essential financial solutions. You can reach the location at 216-291-2300 for specific questions about current rates, applicable fees, and available services at this particular branch.

Cleveland Heights residents can rely on this Western Union for fast access to cash and money transfer services without needing a full banking relationship. Bring a valid government-issued ID to complete most transactions, and feel free to call ahead during busy periods to verify exact service availability. The late-night hours until 11 PM make this Mayfield Rd location particularly useful for evening banking needs.
pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ locations across US in major retailers (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger, Circle K)
24/7 online transfer initiation on WU.com with flexible in-store payment options
Extended agent location hours, many open until 8-11 PM daily, including weekend availability
Multilingual platform support in English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Multiple service options including money orders, bill pay, mobile top-ups, and prepaid cards
Online transfer tracking and Western Union Rewards program for repeat customers
Ability to receive money directly on a card without requiring cash pickup
cons: No transparent fee structure displayed on website; customers must use price estimator before committing to transfer
Limited to agent location hours for in-store payment despite 24/7 online initiation capability
No information provided about exchange rates or competitive comparison to alternatives
Website indicates service outages (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable during page visit)
Minimal educational content or customer support resources visible on location finder page
best_for: International and domestic money transfer recipients needing convenient cash pickup locations
Customers sending remittances to family members without bank accounts or bank access
Bill payers and money order users seeking evening/weekend access without visiting traditional banks
Multilingual speakers in underserved communities requiring payment services in native languages
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers needing convenient money transfer, bill payment, and cash access through retail locations rather than traditional banks, particularly those without bank accounts or requiring multilingual support. The primary caveat is the lack of transparent pricing on the website and the necessity to use their fee estimator tool, combined with dependence on agent location hours for cash transactions despite online service availability.
services: Pick up cash at agent locations
Pay bills through Western Union platform
meta_description: Western Union in Cleveland Heights, OH at 3628 Mayfield Rd. Check cashing and money transfers, open 7AM-11PM daily.
